text:

Log:
  MFH: r498224

  Add USES=compiler:c11 to fix build on GCC-based architectures:

    /usr/local/include/gnutls/gnutls.h:482: error: expected identifier or '(' before '/' token

  While here, also add USES=gnome localbase:ldflags.
